description: Chat dispatches start_brief action when user asks to run the brief synthesis

messages.content: Please run the brief synthesis for Lumen now.

response.reply:
I don't have a brief in context yet — the landing page doesn't hold a programme draft. To run the synthesis, head to the Brief surface and paste (or write) Lumen's programme there: headcount, growth target, flex policy, industry, site constraints, any cultural cues. Once the text is in, I can trigger the Level-1 orchestration from there.

Want me to take you to the Brief surface to get started?

suggested_action.label: Open the Brief surface to draft Lumen's programme
